name: Brute Force
response: Lock affected accounts, enforce MFA, and block the attacking source.

name: Network Service Scanning
response: Rate-limit the source, inspect firewall logs, and verify exposed service inventory.

name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
response: Collect process telemetry, isolate the endpoint, and review parent-child process chains.

name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
response: Block the destination, preserve packet metadata, and validate data access scope.
